title: Orion MC
description: (Overhaul Coming Soon) A Minecraft modpack that revamps every aspect of the game, without straying TOO far from the vanilla feel. This Fabric modpack is carefully crafted to provide an immersive experience.
body:
## (Overhaul is Coming Soon)
# Welcome to Orion MC!
![Thumbnail for Orion MC](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c78eab0f01e4f73338a65ce6a5e56677dcd70e48.png)
## About:
Orion MC is a Minecraft modpack that revamps every aspect of the game, without straying TOO far from the vanilla feel. The modpack features many mods that let you customize your world.
## Features:
✅-Optimization (Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore)

✅-QoL Features (Easy Elytra Takeoff, Mouse Tweaks)

✅-Overworld Generation Overhaul (Terralith+Tectonic)

✅-Nether Overhaul (Amplified Nether, BetterNether, Cinderscapes)

✅-End Overhaul (Nullscape, BetterEnd)

✅-All new structures! (Yung's Better Structures, Hopo's Better Structures, Additional Structures)

✅-Immersion (First Person Model, AmbientSounds)

✅-Effects Galore (Particular, Visuality, Wakes)

✅-UI Overhaul (ImmersiveUI, Smooth Swapping, Item Borders)

✅-Combat Overhaul (Better Combat, Totally Modular)

✅-Small Village Additions (Friends&Foes, Villager Guard)

✅-RPG Looting (Lootr, Loot Beams)

✅-New Player Animations (Serious Player Animations, Not Enough Animations, Just Expressions)

✅-Xaero's Minimap and World Map

✅-NEW Enchantments (Combat, Elemental, and Majrusz's Enchantments)

✅-NEW Potions (Fabric Potions)

✅-NEW Building Materials! (Macaw's Mods, Stoneworks)

✅-150+ Mods!



# **Endless** Customization
Orion MC includes Totally Modular, which allows you to customize your equipment in any way. Want an Emerald Greatsword? What about Redstone Scuba Armor, or an Iron Crossbow?
Totally Modular is compatable with the other mods included in this modpack, expanding the customization even further.
